name: Eiffel Tower Summit Visit
description: Skip-the-line access to the iron lady with panoramic city views.

name: Louvre Museum Guided Tour
description: Expert-led 4-hour tour of world's largest museum including the Mona Lisa.

name: Seine River Evening Cruise
description: Romantic cruise past illuminated Parisian landmarks at dusk.

name: Montmartre & Sacré-Cœur Walk
description: Guided stroll through the bohemian artist's quarter with stunning city views.

name: Parisian Cooking Class
description: Learn to cook classic French dishes with a professional chef.

name: Shibuya Crossing & Harajuku Tour
description: Experience the world's busiest crossing and Tokyo's quirky fashion district.

name: Senso-ji Temple & Asakusa
description: Explore Tokyo's oldest temple and vibrant traditional shopping street.

name: Mt. Fuji Day Trip
description: Guided day trip to Japan's iconic sacred mountain with lake views.

name: Tsukiji Fish Market Food Tour
description: Sample fresh sushi and street food at the world's most famous fish market.

name: Akihabara Electronics & Anime Tour
description: Explore Tokyo's electric town — electronics, gaming, and anime culture.

name: Tegallalang Rice Terrace Trek
description: Hike through stunning UNESCO-listed emerald rice paddies in Ubud.

name: Uluwatu Temple & Kecak Fire Dance
description: Cliffside temple at sunset followed by traditional fire dance performance.

name: Mount Batur Sunrise Hike
description: Pre-dawn hike to the active volcano summit for breathtaking sunrise views.

name: Balinese Cooking Class
description: Learn to cook traditional Balinese dishes at a family-run cooking school.

name: Surf Lesson at Kuta Beach
description: Beginner-friendly surf lessons on Bali's most iconic beach.

name: Central Park Bike Tour
description: Guided cycling tour of 843 acres of New York's beloved green oasis.

name: Metropolitan Museum of Art
description: One of the world's greatest art collections spanning 5,000 years.

name: Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island
description: Ferry to Lady Liberty and the historic immigration gateway.

name: NYC Food Tour – Brooklyn
description: Taste your way through Brooklyn's diverse culinary neighborhoods.

name: Sagrada Família Guided Tour
description: Expert-guided tour of Gaudí's unfinished masterpiece with tower access.

name: Park Güell & Gaudí Walk
description: Explore colorful mosaics and sweeping city views in Gaudí's garden park.

name: Tapas & Wine Evening Tour
description: Bar-hop through Gothic Quarter's best tapas bars with a local guide.

name: Barceloneta Beach Day
description: Relax on Barcelona's famous Mediterranean city beach.

name: Table Mountain Cable Car
description: Cable car to the iconic flat-topped mountain with 360° coastal views.

name: Cape Peninsula Tour
description: Full-day drive to Cape of Good Hope, Boulders Beach penguins, and Chapman's Peak.

name: Stellenbosch Wine Tour
description: Guided wine tasting at three award-winning Stellenbosch estates.

name: Coral Reef Snorkeling
description: Drift snorkel through pristine coral gardens with sea turtles and rays.

name: Dolphin Sunset Cruise
description: Sail into the golden hour with spinner dolphins playing in the bow wave.

name: Manta Ray Dive
description: Dive with the ocean's graceful giants in their natural feeding grounds.

name: Machu Picchu Guided Citadel Tour
description: Expert archaeologist-led tour of the Lost City of the Incas.

name: Inca Trail 4-Day Trek
description: The world's most famous trek — 45km through cloud forest to the Sun Gate.

name: Sacred Valley & Salt Mines
description: Visit Moray, Maras salt mines, and traditional Andean communities.

name: Burj Khalifa At the Top
description: Visit the world's tallest building at 828m for unrivaled skyline views.

name: Desert Safari & BBQ Dinner
description: Dune bashing, camel riding, falconry, and a traditional Bedouin dinner.

name: Dubai Frame & Gold Souk
description: Visit the iconic frame then explore glittering old Dubai.

name: Oia Sunset Walk
description: Join the world to watch the legendary Santorini sunset over the caldera.

name: Santorini Wine Tasting Tour
description: Taste volcanic Assyrtiko wines at three clifftop wineries.

name: Caldera Sailing Cruise
description: Catamaran around the caldera, hot springs swim, and seafood BBQ on board.

name: Fushimi Inari Shrine Hike
description: Hike the famous tunnel of 10,000 vermilion torii gates up Mt. Inari.

name: Geisha District Evening Walk
description: Guided evening walk through Gion hoping to spot a maiko or geiko.

name: Tea Ceremony & Kimono Experience
description: Don a kimono and participate in a traditional matcha tea ceremony.

name: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove & Monkeys
description: Walk the ethereal bamboo forest then visit the monkey park for stunning views.

name: Torres del Paine W Trek
description: The classic 4-day circuit through the park's most dramatic landscapes.

name: Perito Moreno Glacier Walk
description: Walk on the ice with crampons on one of the world's most accessible glaciers.

name: Condor & Puma Wildlife Safari
description: Guided 4WD safari searching for pumas, guanacos, and Andean condors.

name: Baga & Calangute Beach Day
description: Spend the day on Goa's most iconic stretch of golden sand with beach shacks and water sports.

name: Old Goa Churches Heritage Walk
description: Explore UNESCO-listed Portuguese colonial churches including the Basilica of Bom Jesus.

name: Dudhsagar Waterfall Jeep Safari
description: Thrilling jeep ride through the Western Ghats jungle to one of India's tallest waterfalls.

name: Anjuna Flea Market & Nightlife
description: Wednesday flea market by day, legendary trance parties and beach bars by night.

name: Spice Plantation Tour & Lunch
description: Guided walk through aromatic spice gardens followed by a traditional Goan thali lunch.

name: Amber Fort & Elephant Ride
description: Explore the magnificent 16th-century Amber Fort and ascend by decorated elephant through the main gate.

name: Jaisalmer Desert Camel Safari
description: Sunset camel trek into the Thar Desert dunes, followed by a night under the stars with folk music.

name: City Palace & Pink City Walk
description: Guided walk through Jaipur's rose-pink old city past bazaars, havelis, and the Wind Palace.

name: Lake Pichola Sunset Boat Ride
description: Drift across Udaipur's shimmering lake past the iconic Lake Palace at golden hour.

name: Rajasthani Cooking & Craft Class
description: Learn to make dal baati churma and try block-printing and blue pottery with local artisans.

name: Alleppey Houseboat Backwater Cruise
description: Overnight on a traditional kettuvallam houseboat gliding through palm-fringed canals and lagoons.

name: Munnar Tea Estate Walk & Tasting
description: Trek through emerald hillside tea gardens with a guide and end with a tasting of single-estate teas.

name: Periyar Tiger Reserve Safari
description: Boat safari on Periyar Lake spotting elephants, bison, and rare birds along the forest shore.

name: Kathakali Dance & Kalaripayattu Show
description: Watch Kerala's ancient classical dance-drama and the world's oldest martial art in one evening.

name: Ayurvedic Massage & Panchakarma
description: Traditional 90-minute Ayurvedic Abhyanga full-body oil massage at a certified Kerala wellness centre.
